description: Your physical geography professor needs visual and quantitative materials for a lecture on topographic climate controls. Using NASA Panoply and the NCEP surface air temperature climatology dataset in ~/PanoplyData/, follow the brief at ~/Desktop/himalayan_blocking_brief.txt to prepare visualizations and extract point data quantifying the Himalayan 'thermal wall' effect during the winter monsoon. Compare the temperature gradient between Northern India and the Tibetan Plateau in January and July, and save all outputs to ~/Documents/LectureNotes/ as specified.
